package rulecoverage

func NegativeTemplateHtmlUnescaped() string {
    ruleID := "template_html_unescaped"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`template.HTML(userInput)` or `template.JS(userInput)` type conversions on data from request parameters"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
